audio stats · text vocab · sample quality checks

train loop · Drive checkpointing · loss plots

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes into NB04 HiFiGAN Vocoder?')
g.text: Fine-tune pretrained HiFiGAN on IISc mels

svg.text: Colab survival rules (baked into every notebook)
✓ Save checkpoint to Drive every N steps — not to Colab disk (gets wiped on disconnect)
✓ Stream dataset from Drive in batches — never copy full IISc dataset to /content
✓ Use T4 GPU runtime (free) — Colab Pro A100 recommended for training weeks
✓ Keep sessions alive with periodic cell re-runs — or use Colab background execution
Hindi text → normalization → phonemes → FastPitch → mel spectrogram → HiFiGAN → speech
Click any week or notebook block to explore that phase in detail
